feature_calculations.pct_explore: avg(distanceTraveled, timeSprinting)  — 2 active features; timeOutOfCombat excluded (passive accumulation, inverse of timeInCombat)

scoring_notes.method: per-archetype average (not sum) so each archetype has equal ceiling of 1.0 regardless of feature count
scoring_notes.timeOutOfCombat_reason: Passive signal: accumulates for combat-intent players when no enemies are available. Redundant with timeInCombat (their sum = session time). Replaced by active exploration signals only.
scoring_notes.regeneration_steps: Rerun notebooks 04 → 05 → 06 → 07 after this change to update cluster_centroids.json and anfis_mlp_weights.json
